subcodes.first_line: O cherished fosterling of His Holiness the Nightingale! From the Beloved, this is the prayer, night and day, that the true friends [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ربیب حضرت عندلیب از حضرت دوست استدعای شب و روز اینست که دوستان راستان را
subcodes.subjects: @the power of words; of speech, @firmness in the Covenant, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering
